---
title: "Welcome to My Website"
author: "Manjari Kannan"
date: "2026-03-18"
format:
  html:
    theme: journal
    toc: true
---

# Hello, World!

Welcome to my Quarto website.

## About Me
I am a graduate student at Boston University studying Applied Business Analytics.

## Projects
- EC2 setup lab
- Data analytics work
- Machine learning projects
